LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT VIRGINIA ULLREY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 21, 2011 FOR THE PARTIES TO PROVIDE DEPARTMENT 301 WITH ENDORSED-FILED COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR PAPERS PER LOCAL RULE 2.6 (B) NO LATER THAN MARCH 11, 2011. UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES , N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ULLREY, VIRGINIA BOOZ $18,756.17 PRINCIPAL, $389.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,145.17, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT VIRGINIA ULLREY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S AFFIDAVIT IS UNSWORN, IT CONTAINS NO FACTS SUFFICIENT TO DETERMINE WHETHER SHE MEETS THE STANDARD UNDER SECTION 473 (B), AND HER MOTION IS NOT ACCOMPANIED BY A PROPOSED ANSWER. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - VIRGINIA BOOZ ULLREY, TEL. NO. 238-1714, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT VIRGINIA ULLREY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S AFFIDAVIT IS UNSWORN, IT CONTAINS NO FACTS SUFFICIENT TO DETERMINE WHETHER SHE MEETS THE STANDARD UNDER SECTION 473 (B), AND HER MOTION IS NOT ACCOMPANIED BY A PROPOSED ANSWER. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
